regulatory_events.title: Anthropic wins injunction against Pentagon blacklisting
regulatory_events.summary: Federal judge granted Anthropic preliminary injunction against Trump administration's designation as supply chain risk, finding evidence of retaliation.

regulatory_events.title: EU Parliament stops Chat Control mass surveillance
regulatory_events.summary: European Parliament voted to end Chat Control 1.0 mass surveillance program in what privacy advocates call a major victory.

regulatory_events.title: Meta ordered to pay $375M over children's online safety
regulatory_events.summary: New Mexico jury found Meta did not adequately protect underage users from predatory behavior and harmful algorithms on its platforms.

top_stories.headline: Claude gains computer control capabilities while Harvey raises $200M
top_stories.why_it_matters: Anthropic's computer use feature represents a major leap in AI agent capabilities, allowing Claude to directly control desktops, while Harvey's massive funding round signals continued investor confidence in legal AI despite market uncertainty.

top_stories.headline: Legal industry crosses AI adoption tipping point
top_stories.why_it_matters: For the first time, more lawyers are using generative AI than not, marking a watershed moment for the profession even as reliability concerns persist across firms.

top_stories.headline: Anthropic wins court victory against Pentagon blacklisting
top_stories.why_it_matters: Federal judge grants injunction against Trump administration's supply chain risk designation, finding evidence of retaliation and preserving Anthropic's government contracting eligibility.

one_to_watch.headline: OpenAI shuts down Sora to focus on 'Spud' model
one_to_watch.why_it_matters: OpenAI's decision to kill its video generation platform after just six months signals a major strategic shift toward its next foundational model, potentially reshaping the AI video generation landscape.
